rationale: Light governance mode — single technical reviewer sufficient. Risk profile: pure frontend, data-as-const, no API/schema/middleware/auth changes. scope_notes.design_canon_compliance: All colors via canonical tokens (indigo/teal/amber/slate/accent/ink/border/surface + -soft/-border). Zero hex, one intentional style={{}} on <col> for table colgroup width (only way to size <col> elements).
scope_notes.component_reuse: StatusPill (all 6 permission variants), useRequireRole — existing components, not modified.

deferred_out_of_scope: No frontend unit tests — apps/web has no RTL/Playwright infra; adding one for a static page is YAGNI.
Role matrix editor UI — by design (matrix is doctrine, encoded in TS const, not DB).
